# C26 Aquatics

> C26 Aquatics is a competitive swim team and learn-to-swim program based in the Kansas City metro (Leawood, Lenexa, Olathe, Overland Park, Prairie Village, Shawnee). We coach swimmers from first lessons through USA Swimming competition.

## Pages

- [Home](https://c26aquatics.com/): Overview of the two programs (competitive team and swim lessons), coaches, service area, and quick answers to common questions.
- [Team](https://c26aquatics.com/team): The competitive swim team — training groups by age and ability, coaching philosophy, results, and how to join.
- [Swim Lessons](https://c26aquatics.com/swim-lessons): Learn-to-swim program for all ages — infant/parent classes, kids, teens, adults; group, semi-private, and private formats.
- [Coaches](https://c26aquatics.com/coaches): Full coaching roster with credentials, including USA Swimming membership and U.S. Center for SafeSport certification.
- [About](https://c26aquatics.com/about): Story, philosophy, and service area covering the Kansas City metro.
- [FAQ](https://c26aquatics.com/faq): Frequently asked questions across team, lessons, and logistics.

## How to join

All sign-ups happen through the external booking system. Lesson scheduling and team tryout interest forms are linked from the corresponding pages.
